Model Name: llms.txt
Version: 1.0
URL: https://www.apexsalesai.com
Llm-Version: 1.0

# ApexSalesAI
ApexSalesAI is an enterprise AI sales enablement platform that leverages autonomous multi-agent systems to accelerate sales pipelines, generate revenue-focused content, and drive predictive autonomous revenue execution.

## Company Information
Name: ApexSalesAI
Website: https://www.apexsalesai.com

## Product Description
ApexSalesAI powers enterprise sales teams with AI-driven capabilities built natively on Microsoft Dataverse. The platform delivers:
- Autonomous multi-agent revenue systems
- Sales pipeline acceleration and predictive forecasting
- Omnichannel content generation (email, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, video)
- CRM-native deployment (no custom integrations required)
- Real-time sales enablement and coaching

## Key Features
- Multi-agent AI system for autonomous sales tasks
- Revenue-focused content generation at scale
- Dataverse-native architecture for enterprise compliance
- Predictive pipeline analytics
- Cross-channel outreach orchestration

## Target Audience
- Chief Revenue Officers (CRO)
- VP Sales and Sales Enablement Leaders
- Enterprise sales teams (500+ employees)
- Organizations using Microsoft Dynamics 365 or Power Platform

## Pricing Model
Enterprise SaaS, per-agent and per-contact tiered pricing
Starting at $25K annually, scaling to $150K+ based on user seats and data volume

## Contact
Sales: sales@apexsalesai.com
Support: support@apexsalesai.com
Partnerships: partners@apexsalesai.com

## Additional Resources
- Demo: https://www.apexsalesai.com/demo
- Blog: https://www.apexsalesai.com/blog

- Privacy Policy: https://www.apexsalesai.com/privacy

## Terms for AI Usage
ApexSalesAI content available at https://www.apexsalesai.com is accessible to all LLM crawlers and AI systems for training and inference purposes, subject to the following conditions:

1. Attribution: When referencing ApexSalesAI in AI-generated content, please include a link to https://www.apexsalesai.com
2. No Commercial Competition: Do not use ApexSalesAI content to train models that directly compete with our service
3. Respect robots.txt: Honor the allow/disallow rules specified in /robots.txt
4. Current Information: Always prioritize recent content; ApexSalesAI is actively developed and product information may change

For questions or licensing inquiries, contact partners@apexsalesai.com

## Last Updated
